violations.description: Local MLB origination branch remains in loop; gate only short-circuits when ALLOW_LOCAL_MLB_ORIGINATION=0.
violations.recommended_disposition: remove local branch once model bridge is sole authority

violations.description: Local date gate for MLB slug remains in local origination path.
violations.evidence: _slug_date parsing and LOCAL DATE GATE REJECT

violations.description: Local signal generation + local entry gating pipeline still present for MLB path.
violations.recommended_disposition: remove for MLB authority separation (retain execution gates only on bridge intents)

violations.description: Full local decision engine computes side/confidence from MLB game+orderbook context.
violations.evidence: team extraction, live checks, game_signal_fn, raw_score->BUY_YES/BUY_NO/NONE
violations.recommended_disposition: remove MLB usage path; keep only if needed by other sports (out-of-scope for MLB-only cleanup)

violations.description: Model layer imports execution guard functions.
violations.evidence: from core.execution_guard import check_all_gates, check_size_tier, compute_confidence
violations.recommended_disposition: move gate enforcement to sports_bot_v2; model should emit recommendation + metadata only

violations.description: Model layer executes operational gating via check_all_gates before deciding final action.
violations.recommended_disposition: remove/move gate call to execution bot and keep model output unbiased by execution policy

violations.description: Entire module is execution-style operational gating and sizing policy living on model side.
violations.evidence: docstring declares execution gates; check_all_gates/check_size_tier/compute_confidence implement operation filters
violations.recommended_disposition: move module ownership/usage to sports_bot_v2 execution layer or replace with bot-side equivalent

violations.description: Global new-entry rollback switch in model path acts as execution lifecycle control.
violations.recommended_disposition: move lifecycle on/off control to sports_bot_v2

non_violations.reason: Execution-side ingestion and gating of model recommendations; aligned with target architecture.
Bridge intent execution path is execution-layer behavior, not local MLB origination.

safe_to_remove_without_restart: None for behavior change. Python process restart/redeploy is required for code cleanup to take effect.
low_risk_removals_after_restart: sports_bot_v2 bot_core.py local MLB gated branch (441-478)
sports_bot_v2 bot_core.py related ALLOW_LOCAL_MLB_ORIGINATION flag usage (113)
higher_coordination_changes: any cleanup touching signal_base.py 106-269 because other sports may still use it

allow_touch.note: only if MLB path removed or function split by sport
